content.en:
Ye Tian has obtained a lot of innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, the ordinary innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance is only three layers, he can't look down on it now, the top innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance has five layers.

And Ye Tian naturally wanted to cultivate the fifth-level innate multi-dimensional Dao body now.

He quickly chose one of the innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies that contained the five-layer inheritance—the Canghai Sword Body!

This innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance comes from the Heavenly Dimensional Realm Lord, and among the Heavenly Dimensional Realm Lord's property, there is a material for cultivating the Canghai Sword Body-Multidimensional Sword Stone.

Therefore, he directly chose to cultivate this innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

Not long after, Canghai Sword Body cultivated to the realm of the first layer, which improved his physical fitness a little and strengthened a little.

After that, he used various resources to improve the Canghai Sword Body.

Gradually, his Canghai sword body was upgraded to the first layer of Xiaocheng and Dacheng, and then the second layer of Xiaocheng and Dacheng......

Ye Tian is very rich now, so he naturally doesn't worry about the improvement of Canghai's sword body.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Canghai Sword Body to the realm of the fourth layer, allowing his strength to skyrocket again.

And he is about to master the tenth dimension will peerless, the tenth dimension will peerless is also 25 very powerful, the original Red Demon Realm Lord will have a tenth dimensional will Absolute Learning, if he is not the Four Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, coupled with the rules of the double dimension, suppressing the other party, otherwise he will also be injured by the Red Demon Realm Lord.

The Tenth Dimension Will Peerless is simply a harvesting technique in slaughtering the weak Fifth Realm, and it can easily slaughter a weak existence.

Thousands of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian completely created the Tenth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique-Ten-Dimensional Sword Mang!

After creating this Tenth Dimensional Will Peerless Sect, his strength increased a bit.

However, if you want to really skyrocket your strength and make a qualitative change in your strength, you must create the supreme mastery of the Five Realms.

However, it was too difficult to create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

Although Ye Tian had the Supreme Peerless Sect on the Silver Mist Axis as a reference, it was impossible to create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect in a short period of time.

Besides, his dimensional rules are still low, and the triple dimensional rules are still not enough, and he needs to continue to improve.

"There are still hundreds of millions of years left in the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, don't worry, as long as I can improve my cultivation to the middle and late stages of the Fifth Realm before the Death Multidimensional Tribulation comes, comprehend the rules of the sixfold dimension, create the Supreme Peerless Sect of the Five Realms, and cultivate those innate multidimensional Dao bodies to the limit of the fourth layer of Dacheng, I will have the invincible combat power of the Fifth Realm, and I will have hope to protect the human race!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the way to protect the human race, he also thought of it, that is, the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

This is the Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Supreme Treasure, which contains infinite voids, and he can transfer countless Terrans into it, and as long as the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower is not broken, the Terrans will be fine.

However, if it encounters an attack by the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, the thirteen tribulations innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure will not be able to bear it, and the sixth realm multi-dimensional life must be intercepted at that time.

Therefore, he must have strong enough strength, otherwise no matter how powerful the treasure is, it will be useless.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's strength in possessing the Fifth Realm cultivation still spread, and many Fifth Realms secretly befriended Ye Tian, hoping to help each other and spend the multi-dimensional tribulation of death together.

Ye Tian was also a false snake, and he didn't really trade with them.

Before the Death Multidimensional Tribulation came, the other Fifth Realms were not worth believing, and they might be pitted at some point.

Flash.

Another 10 million extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the four dimensions, and integrated the Canghai Sword Body into the dimensional body, and cultivated the fifth innate multi-dimensional Dao Body, the Four Tribulations Dao Body!

The Four Tribulation Dao Body is an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that absorbs the power of the four multi-dimensional tribulations of thunder, wind, fire, and light, and is not for the cultivation of the third realm, and the minimum starting point of cultivation must be the top fourth realm, which can withstand these four powers.

Ye Tiandu is in the fifth realm, so he can naturally cultivate the Four Tribulation Dao Body, he can easily cultivate the Four Tribulation Dao Body, and then use various resources to improve.

After a period of time, he also cultivated the Four Tribulations Dao Body to the realm of the fourth layer, and his strength skyrocketed again.

this day.

Ye Xingchen finally comprehended the extradimensional rules of 30,000 Dao.

So, Ye Tian took out some treasures that assisted in impacting the Fifth Realm and handed them to Ye Xingchen to help him impact the Fifth Realm.

With his assistance, Ye Xingchen's chance of impacting the Fifth Realm is about ninety percent, if he can't break through like this, he can only accept his fate.

Of course.

Even if Ye Xingchen really failed to break through, he would have a way to save his life.

Soon.

Ye Xingchen adjusted his state and began to impact the fifth realm.

Time passes slowly.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Xingchen's body began to transform into a dimensional realm, but it did not transform into a dimensional void, after all, he did not comprehend the rules of dimension.

However, this did not prevent him from breaking through.

Bang!!!!

The physical body is transformed, and the soul will is advanced.

After a long time, Ye Xingchen had already stepped into the early stage of the Fifth Realm.

It took him another period of time to stabilize his realm before he got out. 010

"Father, the child has finally broken through the fifth realm!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"Very good, continue to cultivate, and strive to comprehend the dimensional rules as soon as possible!" Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

But Ye Tian also knew that even if Ye Xingchen broke through the fifth realm and comprehended the super-dimensional rules relatively quickly, if he wanted to improve to 100,000 super-dimensional rules, it was not possible to do it in a short period of time, if there was no great opportunity, he would not be able to do it before the multi-dimensional tribulation came.

It's not that he didn't think about giving the things of the dimensional rules to Ye Xingchen, but it was useless, the things of the dimensional rules could only be used to comprehend the dimensional rules, and if he didn't comprehend the dimensional rules, the things that comprehended the dimensional rules would have no effect.

In the past few million extradimensional eras, Ye Tian's wife and daughter have also broken through to the fifth realm, but they have almost exhausted the resources on Ye Tian's body to assist in impacting the fifth realm.

That was the resources given to him by the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, the Fifth Realm Invincible, and they were all used on it, but Ye Tian didn't care.

However, maintaining the cultivation of the four Fifth Realms, he suddenly was not very rich himself, and if he continued like this, he would become poor sooner or later.

"I have to do it against the inheritance of the Lord of the Wumu Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he still has to comprehend the rules of the five dimensions before he starts, which is more probable.
